category_description: Session-layer protocol reject codes covering FIX session establishment, sequencing, and lifecycle events.

fixtures.title: Invalid credentials
fixtures.trigger_condition: Logon message (35=A) arrives with a password that does not match the stored credential for the SenderCompID.

expected_reject.message: Logon rejected: invalid credentials for SenderCompID FIX-BUY01.

fixtures.remediation: Verify the session password with the session admin and resubmit the Logon.

fixtures.title: Sequence gap detected
fixtures.trigger_condition: An inbound message arrives with MsgSeqNum (34) greater than the expected next sequence number and PossDupFlag is not set.

expected_reject.message: Sequence gap: MsgSeqNum 45 received, expected 42. Cannot reconcile without ResendRequest.

fixtures.remediation: Issue ResendRequest (35=2) for the missing range, or perform a sequence reset via SequenceReset (35=4).

fixtures.title: Sequence duplicate
fixtures.trigger_condition: An inbound message arrives with a MsgSeqNum that matches a previously received sequence number and PossDupFlag (43) is not set to Y.

expected_reject.message: Sequence duplicate: MsgSeqNum 17 already received and PossDupFlag is not set.

fixtures.remediation: Set PossDupFlag=Y (43=Y) on retransmitted messages, or investigate the sender for sequence counter corruption.

fixtures.title: CompID mismatch
fixtures.trigger_condition: A message arrives where SenderCompID or TargetCompID does not match the values registered for the established session.

expected_reject.message: CompID mismatch: SenderCompID 'UNKNOWN-FIRM' does not match configured value 'FIX-BUY01'.

fixtures.remediation: Ensure SenderCompID and TargetCompID exactly match the values in the session configuration.

fixtures.title: Heartbeat interval out of range
fixtures.trigger_condition: Logon message (35=A) specifies HeartBtInt (108) with a value outside the allowed 1-300 second range.

expected_reject.message: Heartbeat interval 600s is outside the allowed range [1, 300].

fixtures.remediation: Set HeartBtInt (108) to a value between 1 and 300 seconds in the Logon message.
